topic: Why XRP is gonna be next bitcoin
concept: A visual journey through the history and growth potential of XRP, comparing it to Bitcoin's rise.

scenes.visual_description: A white square with a black line displaying 'Capital.com' and a line of gold stars below it. The year '2010' is shown on the left, and '2015' on the right.
A timeline animation showing Bitcoin's creation in 2010 with a brief animation of a Bitcoin logo emerging.
scenes.motion_graphics_instruction: Timeline animation from left to right

scenes.visual_description: A second timeline animation showing XRP's growth in 2015 with a brief animation of an XRP logo emerging.
scenes.motion_graphics_instruction: Timeline animation from left to right

scenes.visual_description: A futuristic cityscape animation with a focus on XRP's potential growth and adoption.
scenes.background_style: Dark blue background with neon elements

scenes.visual_description: Brand reveal with a white square with a black line displaying 'Capital.com' and a line of gold stars below it. The screen fades to black.
scenes.motion_graphics_instruction: Light sweep from left to right
